emails.subject: Legal Online Trading Database
emails.body: Legal Online Trading Database Mike, Could you add two new categories of products to the database for me. That would include the "Yes, Yes with Limits, and No" buttons and also a comment screen for the new products. The two new products are: Credit Derivatives and Bandwidth Thanks! By the way, I can't figure out how to move the Portland masters off the master swap list. I think I am going to need your help with that.
